title: Delosperma papillatum
taxonomy: Delosperma papillatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Delosperma, which is a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. The family Aizoaceae, also known as the vygie family, is a large and diverse group of succulent plants. Delosperma papillatum is further classified as part of the subfamily Ruschioideae. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships within the plant kingdom.
